[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011110011 6
1 111001100 5
2 010100111 5
3 001000110 3
4 011001110 5
5 110111010 6
6 011010110 5
7 011111110 7
